zh.Thornbaugh, Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England: 英國亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Guy Abraham Sapcote於大約1459年出生在英國亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓時，他的父親Sir William Sapcote30歲，母親Anne Semark27歲。他於1479年與Lady Margaret Wolston在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年在英國貝德福爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國亨廷格多史爾。

zh-hans.Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England: 英国亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Guy Abraham Sapcote于大约1459年出生在英国亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓时，他的父亲Sir William Sapcote30岁，母亲Anne Semark27岁。他于1479年与Lady Margaret Wolston在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1505年在英国貝德福爾享年47岁，埋葬在英国亨廷格多史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: Abraham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the first of the Jewish patriarchs, with whom God made a covenant that his descendants should possess the land of Canaan. The Hebrew form is Avraham, and is of uncertain derivation. In Genesis 17:5 it is explained as ‘father of a multitude (of nations)’ (Hebrew av hamon (goyim). It has always been a popular Jewish given name, and was also chosen by Christians, especially by Puritans and other fundamentalists from the 16th century onwards. Various early saints of the Eastern Roman Empire also bore this name. Its currency in the United States was greatly enhanced by the fame of President Abraham Lincoln ( 1809–65 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Guy Abraham Sapcote was born about 1459, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, his father, Sir William Sapcote, was 30 and his mother, Anne Semark, was 27. He married Lady Margaret Wolston in 1479, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1505, in Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Huntingdonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Guy Abraham Sapcote est né environ 1459, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Sapcote, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anne Semark, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Wolston en 1479, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1505, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Huntingdonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Guy Abraham Sapcote um 1459 in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Sapcote 30 und seine Mutter Anne Semark 27. Er hat 1479 in England, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Wolston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1505 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Bedfordshire, England und wurde in Huntingdonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Guy Abraham Sapcote è nato il circa 1459 nel Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Sapcote, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Anne Semark, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Wolston nel 1479, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1505, nel Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Huntingdonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Guy Abraham Sapcoteが約1459年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンで生まれた時，父Sir William Sapcoteは30歳，母Anne Semarkは27歳であった。1479年にイギリスイギリスでLady Margaret Wolstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで47歳で死去し，イギリスハンティングドンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Guy Abraham Sapcote(이)가 대략 1459년 영국 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Sapcote(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Semark(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1479년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Margaret Wolston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 헌틴그도실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Thornbaugh, Northumberland, England: Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Guy Abraham Sapcote nasceu aproximadamente 1459, em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Sapcote, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anne Semark, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Wolston em 1479, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1505, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Guy Abraham Sapcote родился около 1459 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Sapcote было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Semark, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Wolston в 1479 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1505 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности хантингдоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Guy Abraham Sapcote nació aproximadamente 1459, en Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Sapcote, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anne Semark, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Wolston en 1479, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1505, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.
